title: Sample Ingestion Configuration
description: Reference configuration for RAG ingestion pipeline - Technology-agnostic template

files.warning: ALL chunks in this file are placeholders with is_placeholder=true
ALL chunks in this file are placeholders with is_placeholder=true

phase_1.name: Strong Knowledge Foundation
phase_1.status: HIGH PRIORITY - READY FOR CUSTOMER USE

phase_2.name: Placeholder-Aware Context Layer
phase_2.status: LOW PRIORITY - HIGH CAUTION - PLACEHOLDERS ONLY
validation_required: All 20 placeholders indexed with correct safety flags

metadata_application.description: Metadata derivation rules for each chunk type

source_id.derivation: Original chunk ID from source file

is_placeholder.derivation_logic: TRUE if chunk_type in ['Plans', 'Network'] AND status='Pending Detail', else FALSE
is_placeholder.validation: ALL Plans chunks MUST be true, ALL Network chunks MUST be true, ALL FAQ/Rules/Mapping MUST be false

safe_for_client_direct_use.derivation_logic: FALSE if is_placeholder=true OR chunk_type='Mapping' OR (chunk_type='Rules' AND status='Needs Review' for RULE-008), else TRUE for FAQ/Rules with Approved/Active status

requires_plan_confirmation.derivation_logic: TRUE if 'plan'/'coverage'/'benefit' in text OR related_plan_id not null OR chunk_type='Plans'

requires_network_verification.derivation_logic: TRUE if chunk_type='Network' OR 'provider'/'hospital'/'clinic'/'network' in text

retrieval_weight_hint.description: Base weight for retrieval scoring, enforces trust hierarchy
retrieval_weight_hint.validation: MUST be between 0.0-1.0, placeholders MUST be <=0.3

confidence.derivation_logic: 'Very Low' if is_placeholder=true, 'High' if FAQ Approved or Rules Active, 'Medium-High' if FAQ Needs Review/Pending Detail, etc.

steps.name: Parse JSONL files
steps.action: Read and parse each JSONL file into chunk objects

steps.name: Apply metadata derivation
steps.action: Apply all metadata derivation rules from METADATA_APPLICATION_SPEC.md

steps.name: Validate metadata
steps.action: Run all validation checks from VALIDATION_AND_QA_SPEC.md Layer 1

steps.name: Generate embeddings
steps.action: Use embedding model to generate vector for each chunk text

steps.name: Index in vector database
steps.action: Insert chunk with embedding and metadata into vector DB

steps.name: Validate ingestion
steps.action: Run all validation checks from VALIDATION_AND_QA_SPEC.md Layer 2

steps.name: Test retrieval
steps.action: Run 50 sample queries, validate retrieval quality

validation_gates.description: Hard gates that MUST pass before deployment

pre_ingestion.chunk_count: 87 total (20 FAQ + 27 Rules + 20 Mapping + 10 Plans + 10 Network)

re_ingestion_scenarios.description: When and how to re-ingest chunks

content_update.action: Re-ingest updated file only (no changes to other files unless dependencies changed)

placeholder_replacement.trigger: Real plan or network data becomes available
action: Create new chunk with is_placeholder=false, safe_for_client_direct_use=true, retrieval_weight_hint=0.9
Mark old placeholder as status=Deprecated, set superseded_by link
Update mappings to reference new chunk
Remove old placeholder from active retrieval within 30 days
placeholder_replacement.priority: HIGH - Timeline: Plans 6 months, Network 3 months

bulk_re_ingestion.trigger: 20%+ of KB changed or new KB version
bulk_re_ingestion.action: Full re-ingestion following Phase 1 → Phase 2 order

implementation_notes.technology_agnostic: This configuration is technology-agnostic. Implementation teams choose specific tools (embedding model, vector DB, RAG framework) based on their requirements.
critical_requirements: Preserve 2-phase ingestion (Phase 1: 67 strong chunks, Phase 2: 20 placeholders)
Apply ALL metadata derivation rules correctly
Validate placeholder safety flags (CRITICAL - legal liability)
Run all validation gates before deployment
